summary: Iteration 44: Push Token API testing + Notification navigation bug fix verification. Backend APIs 100% PASSED (8 tests). Frontend UI testing limited due to Playwright/React Native Web login compatibility issues - code review confirms navigation fix is correctly implemented.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot automate login in React Native Web - TouchableOpacity button clicks not registering via Playwright
integration_issues.note: This is a testing limitation, not an app bug. Previous iteration_43 confirmed UI works correctly.

POST /api/push-token (valid ExponentPush.details: Returns {message: 'Push token registrato'} for valid tokens

POST /api/push-token (invalid token).details: Returns 400 with 'Token Expo Push non valido' for tokens not starting with ExponentPushToken[

GET /api/notifications.details: Returns list of notifications (3 notifications for admin user)

auth_required.details: All push-token and notification endpoints correctly return 401 without authentication

notification_click_navigation.analysis: Navigation is correctly implemented using expo-router push()

type_specific_icons.implementation: getNotifIcon() function maps notification types to Ionicons

critical_code_review_comments: Push notification infrastructure is correctly implemented but DISABLED by default (PUSH_NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED env var)
The reminder scheduler (_reminder_scheduler_loop) checks for OPEN matchdays and sends 24h/2h reminders - logic is sound
Expo Push API integration uses correct endpoint (https://exp.host/--/api/v2/push/send) with proper message format
Notification click navigation bug fix is correctly implemented: router.push(item.link as any) on line 90
Type-specific icons implemented for matchday_open, standings_updated, news, member_joined, reminder types

success_rate.frontend: CODE VERIFIED (UI automation limited due to RN Web/Playwright compatibility)

seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data from iteration_43 (3 notifications with link=/menu/news for admin user)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend push token APIs fully tested. Frontend notification navigation code verified through code review. Playwright UI testing has challenges with React Native Web TouchableOpacity - consider using native testing approaches or manual verification for UI. Push notifications are DISABLED by default (env var PUSH_NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED=false).
verified_features: 1. Backend: POST /api/push-token registers valid Expo push tokens - PASSED
2. Backend: POST /api/push-token rejects invalid tokens - PASSED
3. Backend: DELETE /api/push-token removes push tokens - PASSED
7. Frontend: Notification click navigation - CODE VERIFIED (router.push implementation correct)

push_notification_status.note: Infrastructure is ready but disabled. Set env var to 'true' to enable when app is published to stores.
